scripts.install:both: concurrently -c "cyan,yellow" -n " back  , front " "cd API_5_SEM_BACK && python3 -m venv .venv && . .venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt" "cd API_5_SEM_FRONT && npm i"
scripts.serve:both: concurrently -c "cyan,yellow" -n " back  , front " "cd API_5_SEM_BACK && . .venv/bin/activate && python manage.py runserver 0.0.0.0:8000" "cd API_5_SEM_FRONT && npm run dev"
